title: Shared Inventory (NeoForge)
description: Sync your inventory with friends in real-time!
body:
📦 Shared Inventory

Shared Inventory is a mod that synchronizes inventories between players in real-time. Perfect for co-op survival, multiplayer adventures, and playing with friends!

✨ Features

⚡ Instant Synchronization — all items sync in real-time

👥 Groups up to 10 Players — team up with your friends

🔄 Real-time Updates — changes are visible to all members instantly

🧹 Auto-Cleanup — player inventory is cleared on leave/kick

📦 Full Inventory — all 41 slots synchronized (36 inventory + 4 armor + right hand)

🎮 How to Use

Create a group with /inv invite <player>
  
Player accepts the invitation with /inv accept

Enjoy your shared inventory!

All items in the inventory are automatically synchronized between all group members.

⚙️ Commands

Command	Description

/inv help	Show all available commands

/inv invite <player>	Invite a player to your group

/inv accept	Accept a group invitation

/inv decline	Decline a group invitation

/inv kick <player>	Remove a player from the group (leader only)

/inv leave	Leave the current group

/inv disband	Disband the group (leader only)

/inv transfer <player>	Transfer leadership to another player

/inv list	Show all group members

Enjoy!
